title: Implementation plan: Milestones, tasks, and dependencies

dataFlows.name: User Message to Claude and Back
dataFlows.path: Teams -> Azure Bot Service -> Dev Tunnel -> TeamsBot -> Auth -> MessageBridge -> SessionManager -> Claude SDK -> StreamBatcher -> CardRenderer -> Teams

dataFlows.name: Claude Streaming Output
dataFlows.path: Claude SDK -> StreamBatcher (500ms/200char) -> ContentChunker -> CodeBlockRenderer -> ProactiveSender -> Teams

dataFlows.name: Code Snippet to Adaptive Card
dataFlows.path: Claude SDK -> SnippetExtractor -> LanguageMapper -> CodeBlockRenderer -> Adaptive Card -> Teams

dataFlows.name: File Upload from Teams
dataFlows.path: Teams attachment -> UploadHandler -> local disk -> SDKUserMessage -> Claude Code Read tool

dataFlows.name: MCP Bidirectional
dataFlows.path: Claude Code -> MCP tool call -> McpPlugin -> ProactiveSender -> Teams

deploymentModel.server: HTTP on port 3978 with /api/messages and /mcp endpoints
deploymentModel.state: ~/.cc-ms-teams/ with JSON config, conversation map, session map, audit log

requirements.authentication: Both Azure AD app registration AND personal access token approaches documented
requirements.deployment: Local-first, developer workstation, dev tunnel for webhook receipt

existingSolutions.composio-mcp: Composio MS Teams MCP server - reverse direction reference
existingSolutions.teams-claude-bot: Marvae/teams-claude-bot on GitHub - open source reference
existingSolutions.teams-sdk-v2-mcp: MS Teams SDK v2 native MCP support

features: Send messages from Teams to Claude Code sessions
Receive Claude Code responses in Teams (including streaming)
Share code snippets and file diffs via Adaptive Cards
File upload from Teams to local filesystem
requirements.hosting: Local machine with ngrok/dev tunnel for Teams webhook delivery
requirements.scope: Architecture specification + detailed implementation plan (no prototype)
requirements.techStack: TypeScript/Node.js, Teams SDK v2 or M365 Agents SDK, Claude Agent SDK
requirements.useCase: Full bidirectional chat - send prompts to Claude Code from Teams AND receive notifications/results back

keyDecisions: File sharing dropped from v1.0 scope - deferred to future
Teams SDK v2 over deprecated botbuilder v4
Claude Agent SDK streaming input mode (AsyncIterable) for persistent sessions
Read-only tools as default; write/bash require explicit opt-in
canUseTool callback routes permission requests to Adaptive Cards
MS Dev Tunnels primary, ngrok fallback
Personal chat scope only in v1.0; channel scope deferred
openQuestions: MCP endpoint exposure: local-only vs tunnel (currently local-only)
Azure CLI automation for bot registration in setup wizard
